benefit.en: Accidental death and disability insurance of rupees 2 lakh (death or total disability) or 1 lakh (partial disability) at an annual premium of rupees 20
benefit.hi: 20 रुपये वार्षिक प्रीमियम पर 2 लाख तक का दुर्घटना बीमा

eligibility_rules_human: Indian resident aged 18 to 70 with a savings bank or post office account, who consents to auto-debit of premium and Aadhaar linkage.

offline_steps: Submit signed consent form at the bank
Coverage active for the policy year June 1 to May 31
